valid_partitions: card refund within 180 days -> original card
card refund after 180 days -> store credit
gift card payment -> refund to gift card
invalid_partitions: shipping fee refunded for non seller-fault reason
decision_rules: payment=CARD and days_since_payment <= 180 -> refund to original card
payment=CARD and days_since_payment > 180 -> refund to store credit
payment=BANK_TRANSFER -> require manual review and refund via bank transfer
payment=GIFT_CARD -> refund to gift card balance
exception_cases: partial return with mixed payment methods
